mapper.insert: INSERT INTO donation_campaigns (title, description, image_url, target_amount, current_amount, status, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{targetAmount}, 0, #{status}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE donation_campaigns
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, target_amount = #{targetAmount}, current_amount = #{currentAmount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM donation_campaigns WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM donation_campaigns WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM donation_campaigns WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM donation_campaigns WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO donations (campaign_id, user_id, amount, payment_method, payment_status, transaction_id, anonymous, message, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{campaignId}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{transactionId}, #{anonymous}, #{message}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE donations
payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, transaction_id = #{transactionId}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM donations WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM donations WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND deleted = 0 AND anonymous = 'false' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM donations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM donations WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND payment_status = 'completed' AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM donations WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} AND payment_status = 'completed' AND deleted = 0
